summary: Tested Nexus 001 backend (21/21 pytest passing) and frontend flows (Login, Dashboard, Transactions, Nudge, Insights, Settings) using bearer-token auth via mongosh-seeded session. All endpoints behave correctly; all UI screens render and integrate with backend.

ui_bugs.issue: Due date field uses browser-native `mm/dd/yyyy` input instead of shadcn Calendar component (violates design guideline)

issues: React Radix warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for DialogContent — add DialogDescription for a11y
Recharts ResponsiveContainer warns width(-1)/height(-1) when no data — set explicit minWidth/minHeight on chart container or render empty-state placeholder instead of charts

action_items: Replace native date input in AddTransactionModal with shadcn Calendar/Popover component
Add `<DialogDescription>` (or `aria-describedby`) to all Radix DialogContent usages (AddTransactionModal, SendNudgeModal, QRModal) to fix a11y warnings
On Insights page, conditionally render charts only when data exists, OR set explicit min-height on ResponsiveContainer parents to silence width(-1)/height(-1) warnings
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 759 lines — consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/transactions.py, routers/nudges.py, routers/insights.py for maintainability (>700 line guideline)

POST /api/auth/session: while endpoint sets httpOnly cookie with secure=True samesite=none (correct for cross-site), it also returns session_token in body — frontend stores it in localStorage. Document this dual-mechanism intent; OK for now since /api/auth/me supports both.
Bearer-token fallback uses session_token as the bearer (same value used as cookie). Acceptable but rotate-on-logout is correctly handled (delete from user_sessions).
compute_status: 'Paid' only stays Paid if explicitly passed as current — list_transactions auto-promotes Pending→Overdue but never reverts. Correct.
insights_summary monthly_trend: bucket logic correctly produces 6 sequential (year, month) pairs; labels may repeat (e.g., same Jan across years) but pairs are unique. OK.
nudge_email decrypts password every send — fine; ensure ENCRYPTION_KEY rotation strategy is documented if changed in future (decrypt would fail for old data).
No rate-limit on /api/nudge/* endpoints — a malicious user could spam wa.me link generation; consider per-user rate limit (low priority since wa.me is just a link).

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all screens render & integrate; 1 design bug + 2 a11y warnings)

test_credentials: Seeded via mongosh — token: test_session_1777100690492 (auto-cleaned by test fixture; persistent seed only used for browser test, can be deleted manually if needed).
seed_data_creation: pytest fixture creates a unique TEST_ user + session per run and cleans up (transactions, nudge_logs, sessions, user). Frontend test reused token test_session_1777100690492 created via mongosh.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_nexus_api.py — runs in 1.6s, all green. Frontend uses bearer token: page.evaluate("localStorage.setItem('nx_token', '<token>')") before navigation. Use auth_testing.md mongosh snippet to mint sessions. Email-send flow returns 400 without real Gmail creds (expected). DialogContent a11y warnings, native date picker, and Recharts empty-data warnings remain as known issues for E1 to address.
